impact: This advances the PP&D plan by adding a narrow deterministic regression test for solar permit extraction behavior without live crawling, authenticated DevHub automation, or broad shared-contract changes.
summary: Add fixture-only validation for solar permit requirement extraction categories, evidence IDs, confidence bounds, and stop-gate classifications.
target_task: Task checkbox-78: Add a focused validation test for solar permit requirement extraction that checks only the seven fixture categories, source evidence IDs, confidence bounds, and explicit stop-gate classifications.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
